watering_schedule: Keep field flooded with 2-3 inches water. Drain 2 weeks before harvest.
fertilizer_plan: Basal: 60kg N, 30kg P, 30kg K/ha. Top: 30kg N at tillering, 30kg N at panicle.

watering_schedule: Critical stages: knee-high, tasseling, silking. Irrigate every 10-12 days.
fertilizer_plan: Basal: 60kg N, 30kg P, 30kg K/ha. Top: 60kg N at knee-high stage.

watering_schedule: Regular irrigation based on soil moisture. Water deeply but infrequently.
fertilizer_plan: Apply balanced NPK as per soil test. Split nitrogen application.
